title: BIC Orange Original Fine Ballpoint Pens, Writing Pens with Long-Lasting Ink, Fine Point (0.8mm) Blue, Pack of 20
features: These BIC Cristal Orange Original Fine ballpoint pens are made to last with enough ink to write for an average of 3,5 km
This box of 20 blue ballpoints is great for many sessions of taking notes and drawing
The ball bearing is engineered to perfection so the ink evenly flows from the point for seamlessly smooth writing
Long-lasting BIC Biro pens made from minimal raw materials and certified with the NF Environnement eco-label
description: From the manufacturer The BIC Orange ballpoint pens offers you quality and reliability with a design that is hard to lose track of, making them a good choice for a busy office environment. To save you time and to add a sophisticated touch to these essential and iconic pens, the cap and end plug match the colour of the ink so you can easily find the one you need. Each pen also offers strong writing performance with a 3,500 m writing length on average*. (*SGS test 2013/2014 - average writing length for blue and black cartridges.)
